entities.name: Coordinator
entities.context: Orchestration component that spawns workers, monitors status, and triggers dependent workers upon completion

entities.name: Worker 1
entities.context: First worker in pipeline that builds the data layer and writes outputs to worker_outputs/w1/

entities.name: Worker 2
entities.context: Second worker that builds API layer, depends on Worker 1 outputs

entities.name: Worker 3
entities.context: Third worker that builds test suite, depends on Worker 1 and Worker 2 outputs

entities.name: Data layer
entities.context: Foundational data structures built by Worker 1

entities.name: API layer
entities.context: Interface layer built by Worker 2 on top of data layer

entities.name: Test suite
entities.context: Validation layer built by Worker 3 that runs tests and reports results

entities.name: Worker briefs
entities.context: Documents opened in new conversations that guide each worker's execution

entities.name: Dependency-based execution
entities.context: Pattern where workers wait for upstream dependencies before starting

relationships.context: Spawns W2 and notifies when W1 completes
Spawns W3 and notifies when W2 completes
W2 depends on and loads W1 outputs
W3 depends on and loads W1 outputs
W3 depends on and loads W2 outputs
W3 builds and runs the test suite
